title: Moar Hoes
description: The Moar Hoes datapack adds a ton of new hoe types to the game. These are a mix of uniquely designed hoes with special attributes and abilities… as well as a handful of hoes that are puns. They are intended to somewhat fit into the vanilla game.
body:
Moar Hoes

The datapack REQUIRES this Resource Pack.

The Moar Hoes datapack adds a ton of new hoe types to the game. These are a mix of uniquely designed hoes with special attributes and abilities… as well as a handful of hoes that are puns. They are intended to still mostly fit into the vanilla game in terms of art style and functionality.

So, what do the Hoes do? - **Replanting Hoe:** Right-Click to harvest and replant crops. - **Fortune Hoe:** Harvesting crops yeilds far more. - **Big Hoe:** Hoes in a 5x5 area around where it is used. - **Side Hoe:** A Weapon, and a joke 😀 - **Farmer’s Hoe:** Crops around you grow faster while held. - **Leaf Hoe:** Breaking leafs drops more saplings and apples, and also sometimes drops string.

Patron Exclusive Hoes ($1+)

- **Giant Replanting Hoe:** Right-Click to harvest and replant crops in a 3×3. - **Backhoe:** Mines a large area of dirt. - **Composting Hoe:** Harvesting drops yeilds bone meal. - **Dyeing Hoe:** Right-Click a flower to transmute it. - **Hoe Hoe Hoe:** Harvesting crops sometimes drops presents. - **Ida-Hoe:** Pulls down dangerous potatoes from the sky. - **Lucky Hoe:** Harvesting crops sometimes drop golden versions. - **Potat-Hoe:** Harvesting potatoes drops more poisonous ones. - **Tally Hoe:** Increase or decrease a tally. - **TobaccHoe:** Spew harmful smoke everywhere.

Learn more from this video:



NOTES TO YOUTUBERS: You may use this datapack in whatever video you like, free of charge. My only request: YOU MUST CREDIT ME for my work. Simply link to this page in your video’s description, pinned comment, or both AND verbally mention during the intro of your video that the pack can be downloaded using the link. “Download in the description” would suffice. To install, follow the instructions contained in the “instructions.txt” file included in the download. If you are still having issues installing or want help knowing how to do something with the pack, ask for help on our discord. Fully Multiplayer compatible!
